payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No article content or claims were stored.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable claims about the article should be stored.

details: Requested to remember article at https://example.com/missing.
Reason supplied: useful for memory architecture.
Mock fetch result indicated 404 network error.
No durable memory card was created because the source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Provide a title, author, and summary if you want a minimal reference stored with uncertainty.
